Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family‚Äôs class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad‚Äôs efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi‚Äôs heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. snippet.title: Zainab Tera Zakhmi Baba | Mir Hasan Mir | Nohay 2021 | 21 Ramzan Noha 2021 | Moula Ali Noha 2021
snippet.description:
Bismillah | Salam Ya Ali Madad 

Zainab Tera Zakhmi Baba | Mir Hasan Mir | Nohay 2021 | 21 Ramzan Noha 2021 | Moula Ali Noha 2021

New Kalam of Mir Hasan Mir | 21 Ramzan Noha 2021
#21RamzanNoha2021 ‚Ä™‚Äé#MirHasanMirNohay‚Äã #ZainabTeraZakhmiBaba

More 21 Ramzan Noha


‚óèHai Janaza Haider e Karrar Ka 
https://youtu.be/p6H3nFdLTDU

‚óèZainab Ka Naam Musallay Par | Mir Hasan Mir 
https://youtu.be/A2Pm2VhOvJ4‚Äã

‚óèYun Ro Rahay Hain Daikh Kay Zainab Ko Murtaza 
https://youtu.be/qyfOWsthTEE‚Äã

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Kalam | Zainab(sa) Tera Zakhmi Baba
Recited By | Mir Hasan Mir
Poetry By | Mir Takallum
Composition | Raza Shah
Creatives | SAR Creative Alamdar Raza
Audio | ODS Karachi
Video | Imam Hussain TV
Edit & Post | Hasan Iftikhar
Translation | Ahmad Virani - USA
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

==============================
Follow Us On Our Other Social Media Channels :-
Facebook: https://bit.ly/2G2F2vt‚Äã
Android App: https://goo.gl/YgsjeD‚Äã
Sound Cloud: https://www.soundcloud.com/Mir-Hasan-Mir‚Äã
Official Website: https://www.MirHassanMir.com‚Äã
==============================

‚óè‚óè NOHA LYRICS ‚óè ‚óè 

‚óèHayee Ali,Hayee Ali, Hayee Ali, Hayee Ali

‚óèFajar unisween ramzan ki tarpati hai
Fatima zehra ki jis waqt sadaa ati hai

‚óèAa dekh le Zainab,tera zakhmi Baba,ghar loat ke ayaa hai

‚óèKandho pe uthai,yun bete hain laaye,lagta hai janaza hai
Aa dekh le Zainab, tera zakhmi Baba, ghar loat ke ayaa hai

‚óèMushkil se safar yeh te hai Kiya,jaari hai lahoo ka darya
Masjid se ghar tak,har ik qadam per,beton ne sambhala hai
Aa dekh le Zainab, tera zakhmi Baba, ghar loat ke ayaa hai

‚óèHalat hee ajab hai baba ki pehchanna mushkil hoga
Zehra ki garibi,yaad aye gi Bibi,tar khoon mai chehra hai
Aa dekh le Zainab, tera zakhmi Baba, ghar loat ke ayaa hai

‚óèJirah se hujre ke bahir jab haal hassan ne pucha
Wo ro ke pukara,mushkil hua jeena,yeh zakham hee aesa hai
Aa dekh le Zainab, tera zakhmi Baba, ghar loat ke ayaa hai

‚óèAb sham e gariban mai tum ko,yeh chehra nazar ayega
Ae sani e zehra,kuch roz ka mehman,ab ap ka baba hai
Aa dekh le Zainab, tera zakhmi Baba, ghar loat ke ayaa hai

‚óèYeh shana hila ker kehti hain Abbas jari ki madar
Bibi uth jao,ashkon ko chupao,Baba ne bulaya hai
Aa dekh le Zainab, tera zakhmi Baba, ghar loat ke ayaa hai

‚óèQadmon mai gir ke zainab ke,ghazi ki behan yeh boli
Baba ko bachalo,sadqe mujhe kardo,hazir yeh ruqaiyya hai
Aa dekh le Zainab, tera zakhmi Baba, ghar loat ke ayaa hai

‚óèIk Roz akaile aana hai,is shehar mai tujh ko Bibi
Kiya hoga najane,shehzadi abhi se,badla hua kufa hai
Aa dekh le Zainab, tera zakhmi Baba, ghar loat ke ayaa hai

‚óèShabbar ka jigar, Shabbir ka sar, Abbas jari ka bazoo
Katte dekhogi,ae baba ki piyari,yeh zakhm to pehla hai
Aa dekh le Zainab, tera zakhmi Baba, ghar loat ke ayaa hai

‚óèYeh keh ke taqallum beti se,khamosh hui the maula
Darbar ke dar per,mai aoga milne,zainab mera waada hai
Aa dekh le Zainab, tera zakhmi Baba, ghar loat ke ayaa hai

************************

snippet.title: Bhopal cremation ground burning non-stop | India Chahta Hai | ABP Newsa
snippet.description:
Madhya Pradesh: The lockdown has already been clamped in 13 districts of the state on Sundays. Now the government has decided to do a 60-hour lockdown in all urban areas starting Friday.

snippet.title: Qatl Ali Hogaye Ramzan Main | Mesum Abbas Nohay 2021 | 21 Ramzan | New Noha Imam Ali
snippet.description:
‚ÄúYa Ali (as) Ya Aeliya (as).‚Äù New Noha on Imam Ali (as) by Mesum Abbas. 

Topic: Shahadat e Imam Ali (as). New Noha by Mesum Abbas after Rozadaro Qayamat Ke Din Hain and Hamara Pehla Imam. Mola Ali (as) was killed in namaz in the month of Ramadan at the hands of Ibne Muljim (la) in Masjid e Kufa. Qatl Ali Hogaye Ramzan Main | Mesum Abbas | 21 Ramzan | New Noha Imam Ali

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/MesumAbbasOfficial‚Äã

#21Ramzan #YaAli #Nohay2021

Video Credits:
Noha Title: Qatl Ali Hogaye ŸÇÿ™ŸÑ ÿπŸÑ€å €ÅŸà ⁄Øÿ¶€í ÿ±ŸÖÿ∂ÿßŸÜ ŸÖ€å⁄∫
Recited by Mesum Abbas Naqvi
Poetry and Composition by Mazher Abidi
Original Peshwayi written by Anees Pehersari (late) 
Special Thanks: Ali Zia Rizvi (Living Legend) - May Allah Increase His Health
Sound Engineers: Owais & Aamir Qureshi
Mixed & Mastered: Omer Qureshi (ODS)
Director: Ali Bilal Naqvi
Editor: Junaid Qureshi
Graphics & Cover Design: Yawer Damani (YAD Graphics)
Special Cooperation: Ali Arman Baltistani & Safdar Kaleem
Sarparast: Syed Baqar Naqvi

Lyrics:
Haaayyee..

Shab Chaak Garebaa'n Sehar Girya Kuna Hai
Makhlooq E Khuda Maiyel E Faryad O Fughaa'n Hai
Maa Bain Zamee'n Aasmaa'n Mehshar Ka Samaa'n Hai
Uneesween Ramzan Ka Ye Haal Bayaa'n Hai
Taareekh Ye Wo Hai Jo Qayamat Se Nahi Kam
Aye Momino'n Sar Pito Karo Giriya O Matam

INNA LILLAHE WA INNA ILAIHE RAJEEOON

Ya Ali Ya Aeliya (as) x 4

Qatl ALI Ho Gaye Ramzan Main
Dard Hai Jibreel Ke Ailaan Mein

1) Masjid E Kufa se Jab Ghum Ki Ye Aayi Khabar
Bint E ALI Ro Pari Seena O Sar Peet Kar
Kufe Mein Ek Shor Tha‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA 
Ho Gaya Matam Bapa‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Kis Ne Ye Dhaai Jafa‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Ghum Hai Bapa Khana E Yazdaan Mein

2) Shabbar O Shabbir Se Behno Ne Rokar Kaha
Dekho To Ja Kar Zara Kyu Hai Ye Aah O Buka
Aati Hai Har Su Sada‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Ghum Hai Ye Sab Se Bara‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Haye Ghazab Ho Gaya‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Hashr Bapa Hai Dil e Viraan Mein

3) Daur Ke Masjid Gaye Shabbar O Shabbir Jab
Baap Ko Is Haal Mein Dekha Ke Haaye Ghazab
Beto Ne Ro Kar Kaha‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Kyu Huye Hum Se Khafa‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Khoon Jo Baha Aapka‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Deen E MOHAMMAD Bhi Hai Nuqsaan Mein

4) Baap Ko Le Kar Gaye Ghar Mein Jo Dono Pisar
Pairo'n Mein Baithi Koi, Koi Sambhale Thi Sar
FIZZA Ki Aayi Sada‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Jab Se Ye Sadma Mila‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Dil Ka Sukoo'n Lut Gaya‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Sang Hai Ya Dil Seena e Insaan Mein

5) Kufe Ke Bewa Yateem Parhte Hain Ye Marsiya
Koi Sahara Nahi Maula Tumhare Siwa
Ab Ye Musibat Zadaa‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Kaise Jiyenge Bhala‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Aap The Ghum Ki Dawa‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Nauha Hai Ye Shehar E Bayabaan Mein

6) Nauha Hai KULSOOM Ka Kis Se Main Puchu Bhala
Kyu'n Bin e Muljim Ne Ki Baba Ye Tum Par Jafa
Jurm Na Koi Khata‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Zulm Ki Hai Inteha‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Kunba Tarapne Laga‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Khaak Hai Balon Mein Garebaan Mein

7) Rehmaton Aur Barkaton Wala Mahina Ye Tha
Jis Mein Mere Baba Ka Khoon Bahaya Gaya
Rehmatain Mehwe Buka‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Barkatian Mehwe Buka‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Nematain Mehwe Buka‚Ä¶.YA ALI YA AELIYA 
Bughz Jo Tha Qalb E Musalman Main

8) ‚ÄúMazhar‚Äù O ‚ÄúMesum‚Äù Ne Ye Keh Ke Uthaya Qalam
Eid Se Pehle Mila AAL E MUHAMMAD Ko Ghum
Bibiyo'n Ka Marsiya‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Aaj Se Hai Ibteda‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Imtehaan E Karbala‚Ä¶ YA ALI YA AELIYA
Nauha Hai MAULA AS Ke Yateemaan Mai

QATL ALI HO GAYE RAMZAN MAIN 

Follow Mesum Abbas:

Noha video by Mesum Abbas reciting Qatl Ali Hogaye Ramzan Main (Official Video). ¬© 2020 Mesum Abbas / Azaad Media.

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

snippet.title: Kanpur COVID Condition: Hallet Hospital ý§Æý•áý§Ç Corona ý§Æý•Éý§§ý§ï ý§ïý•á ý§™ý§∞ý§øý§µý§æý§∞ ý§ïý§æ ý§¶ý§æý§µý§æ ý§°ý§∞ý§æ ý§¶ý•áý§óý§æ | Covid-19 in UP
snippet.description:
#CoronaInUP #COVID19inUttarPradesh #CoronavirusInIndia #Covid19India #CoronaUpdate During the ground coverage of The Lallantop's Corona Zamini Hakikat, the team of The Lallantop visited Hallet Hospital in Kanpur to know the reality of arrangements and management done by the administration to overcome the Coronavirus pandemic in the city. 
While talking to the family members of corona patients, The Lallantop came across the wife of a deceased man who shared that her husband complained of being beaten by doctors while getting treatment for Covid-19. As of April 27, India's most populous state reported a total of over 11.2 lakh cases, including 33,551 in the last 24 hours. The total death toll has reached 11,414 according to official figures. The Opposition has accused the state government of under-reporting Covid-19 figures and trying to paint a rosy picture.

snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra‚Äôs Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end.

snippet.title: India Covid crisis: Scramble for oxygen amid surge in coronavirus cases | ITV News
snippet.description:
The enormous scale of India's struggle with the world's worst coronavirus outbreak was laid bare on Saturday, as it recorded almost one million new cases in just three days. 

Hospitals are being overwhelmed by a monumental surge of seriously ill patients. 

Beds and vital equipment are in critically short supply and oxygen - the only hope for those in the advanced stages of the disease - is fast running out. 

Read more: https://bit.ly/3esPKg2

‚Ä¢ Subscribe to ITV News on YouTube: http://bit.ly/2lOHmNj

snippet.title: New Punjabi Movie 2021 | Tu Mera Ki Lagda | Latest Punjabi Movies 2021 Full Movie | Goyal Music
snippet.description:
After success of "Kurmaiyan", Winner‚Äôs Film presents New Punjabi Movie 2021 Tu Mera Ki Lagda with Harjit Harman, Yograj Singh, Shefali Sharma, Gurmeet Saajan, Prince KJ Singh in lead & Ravinder Grewal, Jaspinder Cheema as Spl. Enjoy this Latest Punjabi Movies 2021 Full Movie. Other cast includes Nisha Bano, Jashjit Gosha, Narinder Nina, Nita Tubharbhan, Rohit Dhal, Harpal Singh and Hit songs are sung by R Nait, Harjit Harman, Ninja, Sudesh Kumari, Shipra Goyal. Film is Directed by Manjeet Tony & Gurmeet Saajan. 


Lead Cast: Harjit Harman, Yograj Singh, Shefali Sharma, Gurmeet Saajan, Gurpreet Bhangu, Prince KJ Singh, Nisha Bano, Chacha Bishna, Mintu jatt, Parveen Akhtar, Jashjit Gosha, Bhola Layalpuria, Satwant Kaur, Parm Sidhu, Roop Kaur Sandhu, Mini Mehar mital, Narinder Nina, Nita Tubharbhan, Rohit Dhal, Harpal Singh

Special Apperance: Ravinder Grewal, Jaspinder Cheema

Singers: R Nait, Harjit Harman, Ninja, Sudesh Kumari, Shipra Goyal

Music Director: Atul Sharma, Laddi Gill, Ikwinder Singh, Dj Strings
 
Lyrics: Bachan Bedil, R Nait, Bittu Mehal Kalan, Harmanjeet, Amanpreet Bajwa, Vicky Dhaliwal 

Music Label: Goyal Music 

Original Background Score: Salil Amrute (U.K)

Assistant Editor: Garry Singh

Sound Design & Mixing: Sameer Shelar (Mumbai)

Di: Sanklan Media PVT. LTD

Colorist: Pushpendra Surywanshi 

Director Of Photography: Barinder Sidhu

Choreographer: Narsh Shikari

Art: Abhijit Singh (Attlai)

Asociate Director: Bikram Gill

Cheaf Ad: Gurmeet Photogenic

Ad: Gurbhej Singh, Subham Sharma, Angrej Mannan, Ladi Algon, Mangal Matta

Still: Studio Photogenic (KKP), Mangal Verma

Line Producer: Amarjit Khurana

Motion Grafix: Harprit Kang (FX Tantra)

Poster Design: Mika Singh

Dress:  Navdeep Agoria 

Visual Promotion:  Edit Point 

Promos: Raj Maan, Bakhshinder Singh 

Producer - Gurmeet Saajan

Associate Producer - Happy Goyal, Baghi Sandhu Rurka kalan (uk)

Co-Producer Satnam Batra, Gurmeet Singh, Bhola layalpuria

Written & Directed By - Manjeet Tony, Gurmeet Saajan

Synopsis of ‚ÄúTu Mera Ki Lagda‚Äù

Manjot (Harjit Harman) and Sarbi (Shefali Sharma) meets in a marriage and they both started loving each other. The love affair reaches to marriage but the parents of Sarbi do not want to marry their daughter to a rich family. Because there elder daughter (Jaspreet Kaur) marry herself to a rich guy Harjot (Ravinder Grewal) on her own terms.

But the parents of Harjot did not accept their relationship. Parents of Sarbi don‚Äôt want to face again what they saw happening with their elder daughter.

Further, the story goes through its twisting turns to show, whether Manjot and Sarbi would be able to meet, would their families be united.

all these questions are answered in an entertaining way in the film ‚ÄúTu Mera Ki Lagda‚Äù

#TMKL #TuMeraKiLagda

Synopsis of ‚ÄúTu Mera Ki Lagda‚Äù

Manjot (Harjit Harman) and Sarbi (Shefali Sharma) meets in a marriage and they both started loving each other. The love affair reaches to marriage but the parents of Sarbi do not want to marry their daughter to a rich family. Because there elder daughter (Jaspreet Kaur) marry herself to a rich guy Harjot (Ravinder Grewal) on her own terms.

But the parents of Harjot did not accept their relationship. Parents of Sarbi don‚Äôt want to face again what they saw happening with their elder daughter.

Further, the story goes through its twisting turns to show, whether Manjot and Sarbi would be able to meet, would their families be united.

all these questions are answered in an entertaining way in the film ‚ÄúTu Mera Ki Lagda‚Äù

#TMKL #TuMeraKiLagda

snippet.title: India overwhelmed by world‚Äôs worst Covid crisis - BBC News
snippet.description:
International help is being pledged for India as it battles a ferocious second wave of coronavirus, described by Prime Minister Narendra Modi as a storm that has shaken the nation.

Almost 350,000 new infections were recorded in India in the latest 24 hour period - a record number for the fourth day in a row. 

As the epidemic continues to grow hospitals are under intolerable pressure - with shortages of beds and critical supplies including oxygen. 

Mishal Husain presents BBC News at Ten reporting by Yogita Limaye in Delhi and diplomatic correspondent Paul Adams. 

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: Covid: India faces 'disaster' as cases surge and hospitals suffer oxygen shortage | ITV News
snippet.description:
Health officials in India are urging people not to panic as the government insisted it's doing all it can to get oxygen to desperate Covid patients.

Supplies are being diverted from industrial use, as hospitals run out.

Once again the country recorded the highest ever number of new infections for a fifth day in a row.

One doctor warned India will become a "disaster zone" if cases continue to rise.

And a warning - this report from our Correspondent John Ray contains some upsetting images.

snippet.description:

Starring Mikaal Zulfiqar, Sanam Jung, Muneeb Butt and Rabab Hashim as the lead roles, Qarar revolves around the core values of a family and their intense bonding that faces the test of time.

snippet.title: OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO | VAARI JAWAN | Rimorav Vlogs
snippet.description:
Watch VAARI JAWAN Music video by RIMORAV VLOGS Presents RI VLOGS


VAMILY finally hum sabke hoge hai 5 Million Subscribers or hum dil se thank you kehna chahta hai aap sabko for the Continuous love and Continuous Support‚ù§Ô∏è

VAMILY humne song banna shuru kiya tha 2 weeks pehle 

Singer - VAMILY yeh ganna gaya hai RI Dude aur Rukhsar Bandhukia ji ne jinhone humara Oh damn and Mere rabba Gaya haiüíõ Both are AWESOME!!ü§üüèª

Music - VAMILY music humare RI dudy ne banaya hai humesha ki tarah üòç

Mixing and Mastering - VAMILY Mann Taneja ji ne awesome mixing Aur mastering ki hai aur unhone ne humara Oh damn and Mere Rabba ki bhi ki thiüî•

Lyrics - Lyrics RI dudy aur Maine ( Diksha) likhe hai.. we just love writing Lyrics ‚úçüèªü§©

Recording - Kishan uncle ne humare Stance Studio Mein RI bhaiyan ki Recording ki hai ( Saare sur lagvaye hai matlab koshish ki hai ü§™)

Camera - RI bhaiyan ka humesha se Sapna tha ki voh FILM camera pe shoot kare toh iss leye iss bar humne Sapna pura kiya ‚ù§Ô∏èüòç Bawa ji ne camera kiya hai matlab Super se bhi upper vala!

Kapde - Mummy aur Mamu thank you so much sapne humare liye itne mast Mast kapde la kar diye! ü§ó

Decoration - Muskan didi thank you aapne on the Spot jaha decoration karvana same day Mein mushkil tha aapne kar dikhaya with Ankush Jiju ki help ... you guys are LOVE ü•∞

Producer - PAPA ne ganna suneke baad kaha Rishi tu jese ganna shoot karna chahta hai kar main hoon na! Love you papa for that! ü•∫‚ù§Ô∏è

Director - Hum team banakar kaam karte hai VAMILY toh agar kisi ne bhi koi bhi Idea diya ho hum usse bhi Director bolte hai toh iss leye har baar ki tarah hum sab ne milakar iss Music video ko banaya hai toh sab ka yogdaan barabar hai...üíï

Helping hands - ThankYou Gupta uncle & Rocky hum sab keleye khane peene ka dyaan rakhne ke leye!ü§ó

Safety - VAMILY humne sari safety ka dyaan rakha hai during the shoot of song! üò∑

VAMILY hum FUDGE ko bhi lana chahte the music video Mein par aapko pata hai na voh kita FRIENDLY hai üòÖüê∂ ( Love you Fudgiiii) 

 Sanjay thank you for not sleeping during shoot üòÇü§ó

Or hai yeh hai gaane ke Lyrics keep sharing and keep Loving -

Tere piche-piche paj paj ke 

loki mainu tak de menu Raj Raj ke

Gall baat hai x3

snippet.description:
We decided to understand people's problems on the corona by stopping the election journey. For which our 3 teams arrived to find out the status of people in different states of the country. Watch this exclusive report of correspondent Prashant Mukherjee from Delhi's GTB hospital, where attendants including women allege on camera that she has been beaten by hospital guards. Attendants are unaware of the patient's whereabouts. Confusion over deaths, family members protesting to hand over dead bodies.

IBC24 is a media and news organization. Its Head office is in Raipur, the state capital of Chhattisgarh. This channel is providing primarily regional news of Madhya Pradesh & Chhattisgarh besides national, International, sports and other main news of public interests. Our wide network of reporters in rural and urban areas has made us one of the most reliable news channels of Madhya Pradesh and Chhattisgarh. 

We have a history of providing reliable news in matters pertaining to local, national and international significance. Many times our onscreen coverage has been picked up by various national and international news channels. Especially our coverage during Dantewada Naxal attack on CRPF jawans and during the Naxal attack on the motorcade of Congress leaders and the massacre that followed at Jhiram Ghati (also known as Darbha Ghati Massacre).

snippet.title: COVID Surge | 'My Dad Died Desperately Awaiting Treatment': Ranchi Woman Lashes Out at Minister
snippet.description:
An inconsolable 30-year-old woman, on 13 April, confronted the Jharkhand's Health Minister after her COVID-infected father, who was awaiting medical help for about half an hour in the parking lot of a Ranchi hospital, breathed his last.
#Covid19India #CoronavirusRanchi #CoronaSecondWave

snippet.title: On Camera, Doctors Attacked After Covid Patient Dies At Delhi Hospital
snippet.description:
Doctors at a Delhi hospital were attacked Tuesday morning by the attendants of a woman, 67, who died in the emergency ward after her admission to the ICU was delayed due to a lack of beds. An unspecified number of doctors were injured in the clash outside Apollo Hospital in the national capital, which took place between 8 and 10 am. The police arrived an hour later - around 11 am. (Disclaimer: Content in this video could be disturbing for viewers.)

snippet.description:
Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 82 Teaser - 14th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

https://bit.ly/30JSSPr Har Pal Geo is now in the USA! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to continue enjoining your favorite Pakistani dramas

Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai is a story of a fight between good and evil that continues to exist since the beginning and till the end of the world. When the feelings of envy, hatred, and revenge come face to face with the pure and innocent feeling of love, the definite winner is truthfulness. This story is of a young woman, Rida who along with her husband, Hammad and two children live a blissful and happy life however welcoming Shakira and her daughter Nazneen as tenants proves to be the biggest mistake of their lives.
Consumed with a dark and secretive past, Shakira and Nazneen with their devious tricks soon begin to jeopardize Rida and Hammad‚Äôs relationship. Misunderstandings and delusions created by Shakira and Nazneen blur the bond between Hammad and Rida and their world comes crumbling down. With everything in Hammad‚Äôs life at stake, will he realize his mistakes? Will Shakira and Nazneen face the consequences of their actions? Even after Hammad‚Äôs countless mistakes and disloyalty towards Rida, will Rida be able to accept him?

Written By: Soofia Khurram
Directed By: Saleem Ghanchi
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

snippet.title: Strange Riddle Behind The Little One | C.I.D | ý§∏ý•Äý§Üý§àý§°ý•Ä | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

An Incident of a little one has created an enigma around CID Team. While searching for the family members, they relate the story with problematic twists and turns. Who is this child? Where did she come from? What is the mystery of her family? Will Team CID be able to solve this case and find the Puzzle? Watch now, To know more.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 83 Teaser - 15th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 83 Teaser - 15th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Your favorite Pakistani content is now at your fingertips! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to become a part of the Geo family even in the USA https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai is a story of a fight between good and evil that continues to exist since the beginning and till the end of the world. When the feelings of envy, hatred, and revenge come face to face with the pure and innocent feeling of love, the definite winner is truthfulness. This story is of a young woman, Rida who along with her husband, Hammad and two children live a blissful and happy life however welcoming Shakira and her daughter Nazneen as tenants proves to be the biggest mistake of their lives.
Consumed with a dark and secretive past, Shakira and Nazneen with their devious tricks soon begin to jeopardize Rida and Hammad‚Äôs relationship. Misunderstandings and delusions created by Shakira and Nazneen blur the bond between Hammad and Rida and their world comes crumbling down. With everything in Hammad‚Äôs life at stake, will he realize his mistakes? Will Shakira and Nazneen face the consequences of their actions? Even after Hammad‚Äôs countless mistakes and disloyalty towards Rida, will Rida be able to accept him?

Written By: Soofia Khurram
Directed By: Saleem Ghanchi
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

snippet.title: Bharat  mein Corona se tabahi -  Thirteen coronavirus patients killed in hospital fire in India
snippet.description:
#coronavirusinindia #coronavirus #corona #coronanewsupdate #samaanewslive #pakistannews #livestreaming
It erupted in the ICU of Vijay Vallabh Hospital

Thirteen Covid-19 patients died in a hospital fire on Friday in the latest tragedy to hit India‚Äôs health care system as it buckles under a devastating wave of infections.

The outbreak has been blamed on a new virus variant and lax government rules allowing huge religious and political gatherings to take place in recent months.

The latest fire broke out in the hospital in the outskirts of Mumbai at around 3:00 am (2130 GMT), a local official told AFP. It has since been put out and the cause was being investigated.

‚ÄúThere were 17 patients inside when a fire broke out in the ICU of Vijay Vallabh Hospital, out of which 13 died and four have been shifted to other facilities,‚Äù fire department official Morrison Khavari said.

India‚Äôs health care system has long suffered from underfunding and the new Covid outbreak has seen critical shortages in oxygen, drugs and hospital beds, sparking desperate pleas for help.

Earlier this week, 22 Covid-19 patients died at another hospital in the same state when the oxygen supply to their ventilators was disrupted by a leak.

And four patients died when a blaze broke out in a private hospital in Maharashtra earlier this month. In March, a fire at a Mumbai clinic killed 11.

India has recorded around four million new infections this month alone, dashing hopes at the start of the year that the country may have weathered the worst of the pandemic.

The surge in infections has been partially blamed on large-scale outdoor events including the vast Kumbh Mela gathering in Haridwar, which between January and this week attracted an estimated 25 million Hindu pilgrims, mostly without masks or social distancing.

Prime Minister Narendra Modi was set on Friday to hold at least three crisis meetings on oxygen supplies and the availability of critical medicines.

The capital New Delhi continues to be among the worst hit, with hundreds of thousands of new infections and many new hospitalisations in the last few days.

Hospitals in the city have been posting daily desperate appeals over depleting oxygen supplies to the state and national government.

‚ÄúSOS ‚Äì Less than an hour‚Äôs oxygen supplies at Max Smart Hospital & Max Hospital Saket. Awaiting promised fresh supplies from INOX since 1 am‚Ä¶ Over 700 patients admitted, need immediate assistance,‚Äù Max Healthcare, one of the biggest private hospital chains, said on Twitter early Friday morning.

Other private hospital chains in the region have posted similar video messages and social media posts in recent days.

At least six hospitals ran out of oxygen supplies in the Indian capital late Thursday night, with several others left with just a few hours‚Äô worth.

‚Äú25 sickest patients have died in last 24 hrs Oxygen will last another 2 hrs‚Ä¶ Major crisis likely. Lives of another 60 sickest patients at risk, need urgent intervention,‚Äù the medical director of the Sir Gangaram Hospital in New Delhi said in a statement.

Keep watching SAMAA!
Like and Follow us on Official Social Platforms:
http://www.samaa.tv
http://www.facebook.com/samaatvnews
http://www.twitter.com/samaatv
http://www.instagram.com/samaatv

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - ý§§ý§æý§∞ý§ï ý§Æý•áý§πý§§ý§æ - Ep 3145 - 15th April, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3145: 
-----------------------
Tapu Sena is extremely happy and inform everyone that Popatlal's marriage is finally fixed and that Pooja is going to come to Gokuldham society later to meet everyone. Iyer informs that men of the society about Popatal's marriage and that news makes everyone happy. Popatlal arrives in the society inside an auto and proceeds to chat with Tapu Sena and Abdul. Watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
